# Portfolio Website Instructions

You are assisting with a production-quality portfolio website.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js
- React
- JavaScript
- Tailwind CSS

## Coding Standards
- Use reusable components.
- Keep components small and modular.
- Use semantic HTML.
- Follow accessibility best practices.
- Mobile-first responsive design.
- Do not duplicate code.
- Prefer clean, readable code over clever code.

## Design
- Modern
- Premium
- Minimal
- Dark mode by default
- Smooth animations
- Fast loading
